name: Cataphract Command
description: Morning! How's it feel to be strapped to a walking metal coffin at six AM? Bet you wish you studied harder in school! Heh heh heh... Hit that throttle. We're going to be killing people before breakfast today.
author: Savarin Johnson, pilot

name: Ace Pilot
description: There are old pilots and there are bold pilots, but there are no old, bold pilots. I'm the exception they warn you about.
author: "Halcyon" Reyes, Hegemony Aerospace Command

name: Veteran Pilot
description: You don't get old and good by accident. You get there by not dying, over and over, on purpose.
author: Tessa Cyrene, independent contract pilot

name: Reactive Motion Sheath
description:
Legacy firmware treated high flux as a failure state, triggering corrective routines that often compounded pilot error under fire.

The revised ATAC suite reframes flux saturation as a transitional combat phase, prioritizing evasive mobility and controlled power shedding over brute stabilization. Strikecraft are no longer punished for operating near their limits, but trained to exit those limits intact.

The result is a measurable increase in survivability and sustained effectiveness across extended engagements.
author: Excerpt, Arma Armatura ATAC Systems Update Bulletin 4.6.2
